name: Mariah
answer1:
Yes, I hope to
go on a great
quest!
answer2:
The quest of the
avatar is noble
indeed!
question:
Art thou on
a quest?
yes:
I wish I could
join thee!

name: Tracie
health:
I feel fine...
if I could just
quit smoking!
question: Do you smoke?
yes:
I can tell
by the smell!

name: Cromwell
job:
I speak of the
virtues of
honesty!
answer1:
A few honest men
are better than
numbers!
answer2:
The mantra of
the shrine
of honesty
is 'AHM'.
question:
Dost thou strive
to be honest?
yes:
Then you will
need the mantra.

name: Rebelias
answer1:
Speak the truth
and shame the
evil forces!
answer2:
Evil still
exists in
our hearts
and souls!
question:
Dost thou seek
to conquer thine
own evil?

name: Christen
answer2:
My friend
William knows
where the rune
of honesty is.
question:
Art thou my
friend?

name:
Patric the
Humble Shepherd
answer1:
Humility is
not derived from
the direct
combination of
truth, love or
courage.
answer2:
Humility is to
act and be
humble.
question:
Art thou
totally humble?

name: Shazom
job:
I am apprentice
to the great
wizard Nigel!
answer1:
I will soon
need to use
the spell he
calls 'recall'.
question:
Hast thou
met Nigel?
yes:
Seek him out for
he will teach
thee.

name: Shakespeare
answer1:
Remember, there
is no terror
in threats for
I am strong
in honesty!
answer2:
Corruption wins
not more than
honesty!
question:
Dost thou strive
to be honest?

name: Browning
job:
I strive to live
an honest life!
answer1:
An honest soul
need remember
no lies!
answer2:
Truth is the
root of honesty!
question:
Hast thou
never lied?

name: Cosima
answer1:
I know how best
to mix reagents!
answer2:
A sleep spell
actually
requires but
one part
spider silk!
question:
Dost thou know
how to best mix
spells?

name: Daranor
answer2:
When I die the
world will end!
question:
Do you believe
my story!?!?...
yes:
Then we must
fell the moons!
no:
Idiot, you must
think I am
insane!

name: Inoo
job:
I am a fortune
teller, I read
palms.
health:
I predict I will
be fine today!
question:
Dost thou wish
thy destiny?
yes:
A great quest
will lead thee
into the abyss
where the codex
awaits!

name: Calabrini
job:
I bear greetings
from the fair
city of
Moonglow.
answer2:
Our healer is
one of the best!
question:
Dost thou seek
an inn or
healing?
no:
Perhaps, the
shrine which
lies on an isle
to the north!

name: Dekker
job:
I earn an honest
living, jesting!
answer1:
Honest labor
bears a lovely
face!
question: Dost thou?
yes:
We ought to
exchange jokes
sometime!

name: William
answer1:
It's a peanut
butter and grape
jelly on lightly
toasted bread!
answer2:
Search for the
rune of honesty
by Mariah's
gold!
question:
Wouldst thou
like a bite?

name: Tyrone
job:
I used to search
for the blue
stone.
answer1:
The stone of
honesty is found
on an altar in
the dungeon of
Deceit.
answer2:
It is used
within the
dungeon altar
rooms and in
the abyss.
question:
Wilt thou
search?
